hero.name: Mohammed Akash
hero.intro: A web developer, researcher, and poet — lately building in public with Claude and sharing the journey, day by day.

newsletter.heading: Get AI insights, code experiments & creative writing
newsletter.subtext: Weekly updates on tools, productivity, and building with Claude.

about.heading: A little about me
paragraphs: I'm Mohammed Akash — moh·akash, “the infinite sky.” I started out building websites for clients, and over time my curiosity pulled me toward research and writing as much as code.

Now I'm focused on building in public with Claude — sharing what I learn, where I get things wrong, and the small wins along the way. Between projects I study what fascinates me and write poetry to keep the other half of my brain awake.

facts.label: Background
facts.value: Freelance web developer, now writing & building in public.

facts.label: Education
facts.value: Computer science, with a long detour through the humanities.

facts.label: These days
facts.value: Documenting what it’s like to build with Claude — day by day.

facts.label: The goal
facts.value: To become a clear, trusted voice on building with AI.

contact.heading: Let's make something under an open sky.
contact.intro: A project, a question, a poem you liked — the sky's open. I read everything and reply to most things within a day or two.
openTo: A kind word about a poem
